title.romaji: Donten ni Warau Gaiden: Ouka, Tenbou no Kakehashi
title.english: Donten: Laughing Under the Clouds - Gaiden: Chapter 3 - Conspiracy of the Military
title.native: 曇天に笑う＜外伝＞ ～桜華、天望の架橋～
synonyms: Donten: Laughing Under The Clouds - Gaiden: Chapter 3 - Conspiracy of the Military

synopsis:
The three brothers discover that the human experiment banned after destroying the "Orochi", is still going on to secretly revive the evil snake. They also find out that some ex-members of the Yamainu (the Japanese military unit formed to kill the snake) are behind this conspiracy. The brothers fight together again in a battle against the military.

(Source: Amazon Prime Video)

title.romaji: Donten ni Warau Gaiden: Shukumei, Soutou no Fuuma
title.english: Laughing Under the Clouds: Gaiden Part 2
title.native: 曇天に笑う<外伝> ～宿命、双頭の風魔～
